Whether you place it on your mantel, shelf, or Christmas tree, this Christmas mouse is sure to bring a smile to your face and create a warm and inviting atmosphere in your home. Get into the holiday spirit and make your Christmas decorations extra special with our charming Christmas mouse from Creativ.
